title: OpenAI Acquires Promptfoo to Strengthen AI Security and Testing Tools
description: In a strategic move that underscores the intensifying race to secure advanced artificial intelligence systems, OpenAI acquires Promptfoo, a cybersecurity startup known for its tools designed to test and safeguard complex AI models. The deal, announced Monday by OpenAI, brings the entire Promptfoo team into the organization as the AI powerhouse continues expanding its ecosystem OpenAI acquires Promptfoo to strengthen AI security tools and testing for advanced AI systems.
content:

title: Artificial intelligence firm Anthropic sues DOJ over ‘supply chain risk’ label

content:
